payload.claim_text: YTD passenger revenues were down $1.7 billion (28%) compared with YTD December 2019 and December passenger revenues were $128 million (27%) below December 2019.
payload.subject: MTA Passenger Revenues

tool_args.label: Half of favorable expense variance is timing related

payload.claim_text: Based on a preliminary review, the MTA estimates that approximately half of the favorable expense variance is timing related, and the real/timing analysis will be revised as 2023 financials are finalized.
payload.subject: MTA Expense Variance

payload.claim_text: On an MTA-Wide basis, there were 3,669 vacancies in December, representing a vacancy rate of (5%), which was primarily comprised of vacancies in operations and maintenance (72% of total vacancies).
payload.subject: MTA Total Positions

payload.description: MTA issued $296.340 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Green Bonds, Series 2024A (Climate Bond Certified). Proceeds used to finance existing approved transit and commuter projects. Sold competitively, Jefferies LLC was the winning bidder among 9 bids.

tool_args.label: Upcoming TBTA Sales Tax Revenue Bonds Series 2024A

payload.description: MTA expects to issue Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Sales Tax Revenue Bonds, Series 2024A (TBTA Capital Lockbox - City Sales Tax). Proceeds to finance approved 2020-2024 Capital Program transit and commuter projects and a portion of Central Business District Tolling Program capital costs. Led by Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC with co-senior managers Academy Securities, Loop Capital Markets, and Stern Brothers & Co.

tool_args.label: Toll revenue one-time collection reserve increase

payload.description: Financial Performance Report published by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet captured in current month actuals

payload.gap_text: The Mid-Year Forecast for Payroll does not reflect a projected $135 million expense related to the TWU Local 100 settlement, which was below-the-line in the 2023 July Plan.
payload.missing_information: $135 million TWU Local 100 settlement expense not included in Payroll forecast
